programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: A professional matchmaker finds that she has unexpectedly fallen for one of her clients.

programme.title: 48 Christmas Wishes
programme.desc: Two junior elves misplace a town's letters to Santa and set out to retrieve the missing wishes.

programme.title: The Art of Christmas
programme.desc: Struggling artist Liv James accepts a teaching job at a local elementary school to make ends meet.

programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programme.title: A Royal in Paradise
programme.desc: Struggling with writer's block, Olivia takes a vacation and meets a prince who must marry royalty.

programme.title: A Belgian Chocolate Christmas
programme.desc: A photographer takes her friend's place at a Belgian culinary school and bonds with the chocolatier.

programme.title: Much Ado About Christmas
programme.desc: When the truth comes out, it puts a budding Christmas romance at risk.

programme.title: Grounded in Love
programme.desc: When a flight attendant loses her job, she returns to her grandma's farm to replant her roots.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: A new big box chain store threatens Jessica's Christmas tree lot when it begins to sell trees.

programme.title: A Royal Date for Christmas
programme.desc: A European Duke arrives in the US, he realizes that his bags have been lost in transit.

programme.title: A Christmas… Present
programme.desc: Maggie Larson is determined to give her brother and niece the best Christmas possible.

programme.title: Dream Wedding
programme.desc: When sisters Megan and Kate attend a local wedding fair, they enter for a dream wedding package.

programme.title: Fall Into Winter
programme.desc: Kerry's high school nemesis unexpectedly buys into Kerry's family-owned candy shop.

programme.title: A Christmas Castle Proposal
programme.desc: Olivia and Prince Alexander travel to a majestic palace to spend Christmas with their two families.

programme.title: Christmas in Carolina
programme.desc: A career-driven woman tries to find love and rediscover the spirit of Christmas.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: A Paris Christmas Waltz
programme.desc: Emma meets pro dancer Leo as his passion is waning; she gets a chance to join Leo in a competition.

programme.title: Scents and Sensibility
programme.desc: Two sisters (Ashley Williams, Marla Sokoloff) must fend for themselves.

programme.title: Mr. Manhattan
programme.desc: Mason's life turns upside down when he becomes the sole guardian of his late brother's kids.

programme.title: Key to Love
programme.desc: Bookstore owner Samantha Hill starts an antagonistic relationship with a book cover model.

programme.title: Christmas on the Coast
programme.desc: Dru Cassadine's newest romance story may just star her and an eligible bachelor.

programme.title: Love's Second Act
programme.desc: Jamie, an aspiring filmmaker, visits her hometown for inspiration and finds it in her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: A Kindhearted Christmas
programme.desc: Jaime tries to anonymously give gifts to those in need while pursuing a new romance.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy Donaldson struggles with her mom's shadow, Muriel, the Christmas darling of Icicle Falls.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Travel blogger Nicole meets Kade, a competing magazine rep, while travelling abroad.

programme.title: A Merry Christmas Wish
programme.desc: An NYC advertising executive gets involved with organizing the yearly Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: Christmas Wreaths and Ribbons
programme.desc: A woman receives help from a neighbor when an injury puts her holiday wreath deliveries in jeopardy.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist who fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo.

programme.title: Learning to Love - For Hopeless Romantics
programme.desc: Harry and his two daughters lose their faith and struggle to connect.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Holiday
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter and an impetuous prince cross paths and begin to fall for each other.

programme.title: My Christmas Hero
programme.desc: An army reserve doctor tracks down her family's military history with the help of a new romance.

programme.title: Let It Snow
programme.desc: An executive with plans to update a rustic lodge has a change of heart when she falls in love.

programme.title: The Abigail Mysteries
programme.desc: A woman struggling with loss works with a local cop and childhood crush to solve a mystery.

programme.title: The Abigail Mysteries
programme.desc: A woman struggling with loss works with a local cop and childhood crush to solve a mystery.

programme.title: Finding Faith
programme.desc: Victoria, a Christian advice columnist, begins to lose her faith after a series of life events.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this two-part season premiere, the residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.
